Name: Jasper DNC Events
Description: General-purpose Dancer event profile for PvE. Keeps Shield Samba/Curing Waltz support, earlier self-heal recovery, AutoPartner/default damage-toggle safety, normal 2+ target AoE and dance-burst release, Head Graze interrupts, Arm's Length self-defense, optional cooldown holds, wipe/zone reset scaffolding, and optional out-of-combat Sprint for roulette-safe play. ForceAOE is manual-only and is never reset by this profile. Based on Arche's general reaction profile foundation, with Jasper modifications for public-duty safety and xSalice compatibility.

Events.Name: Second Wind
Events.Description: Uses Second Wind at 60 percent HP for earlier self-recovery.

Events.Name: Curing Waltz
Events.Description: Uses Curing Waltz for nearby party recovery when HP is already slipping.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Dancer ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores default Dancer toggles after zone changes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Wipe
Events.Description: Restores default Dancer toggles after wipes.

Events.Name: Curing Waltz Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Curing Waltz for self-pressure around 75 percent HP without forcing damage cooldowns.

Events.Name: Head Graze Interrupt
Events.Description: Uses Head Graze on casting enemies in range.

Events.Name: Arm's Length Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Arm's Length when you are stationary, low on HP, and holding multiple mobs.

Events.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Events.Description: Keeps AutoPartner, dance burst, AoE, fan spending, and general Dancer damage toggles in a sane public-duty state.

Events.Name: Multi-Target AoE Release
Events.Description: Keeps normal Dancer AoE, step, burst, and spender toggles enabled on 2+ enemy pulls without touching ForceAOE.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 65%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for earlier Second Wind recovery.

Conditions.Name: Second Wind <= 65%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for earlier Second Wind recovery.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 75%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for Curing Waltz emergency use.

Logics.Name: Second Wind
Logics.Description: Uses Second Wind at 60 percent HP for earlier self-recovery.

Logics.Name: Curing Waltz
Logics.Description: Uses Curing Waltz for nearby party recovery when HP is already slipping.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Dancer ACR defaults out of combat, including AutoPartner and standard damage toggles, while keeping ForceAOE untouched.

Logics.Name: Curing Waltz Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Curing Waltz for self-pressure around 75 percent HP without forcing damage cooldowns.

Logics.Name: Head Graze Interrupt
Logics.Description: Uses Head Graze on casting enemies in range.

Logics.Name: Arm's Length Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Arm's Length as self-defense when stationary below 70 percent HP with two or more mobs on you.

Logics.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Logics.Description: Keeps Dancer AutoPartner, steps, flourish/devilment, AoE, fan spending, and utility toggles healthy in combat so imported or held states do not leave the job passive.

Logics.Name: Multi-Target AoE Release
Logics.Description: Keeps normal Dancer AoE, step, burst, and spender toggles enabled on 2+ enemy pulls without touching ForceAOE.

Items.Name: Boss Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Technical Step, Flourish, and Devilment near the end of a boss. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Pack Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Technical Step, Flourish, and Devilment near the end of a trash pack. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Samba
Items.Description: Uses Shield Samba for raidwide damage when another physical-ranged shield is not already active.

Items.Name: Waltz
Items.Description: Uses Curing Waltz for nearby party or personal recovery.

Items.Name: Self Guard
Items.Description: Uses Second Wind and Arm's Length for personal emergency recovery.

Items.Name: Interrupt
Items.Description: Uses Head Graze on interruptible casts in range.
